title: Yaaradi Nee Lyrics From Jarugandi 2018 Film
stanzas:
yaaradi nee, naanaaga
adi kaalam kaiyil
varume, thaanaaga.
Pogum vazhi, poovaaga
Ini kaatril mithappen
Naanum noolaaga.
Yaarovaaga ninaithn
Poove unakkaai kaninthen
Theevin naduvil
Maramaai naan iruppen.

Oaivaai paravai irukka
Uravaai siragai virikka
Aalakadalil padagaa
Iravin nilavu nee ..

Pudhupudhu mazhaigalai alli
Mazhaigalum kuzhithidume
Uravindri valarkindra vembil
Panai vandhu mulaithidume.

Chuda chuda sooriyan kandu
Ulagamum thulirthidume
Nagarkindra megangal pole
Thuyarangal nagarndhidume.

O..ho.. vaanathin thaaragai
Vaasal thedi vandhathe.
Vaadhaigal thooramaai
Oadi poguthe.

Adi thaagangal theernthu nee
Saaindhu kollum velaiyil.
Thoothanai polave vandhen
Thaangi kollave.

Kannukkul achchangal neengattume
Kaatrinil thendralum neenthattume.
Nammodu kaalangal serattume.
Ondrodu ondraaga maarattume.

Oru vazhi thirkkindra podhu
Maruvazhi adaikindratheno.
Maruvazhi adaikindratheno
Oru vazhi thiranthidumthaane.
Thiranthidum ....
Yaaradi nee
Yaaradi nee
Yaaradi nee

Pudhupudhu mazhaigalai alli
Mazhaigalum kuzhithidume
Uravindri valarkindra vembil
Panai vandhu mulaithidume.

Chuda chuda sooriyan kandu
Ulagamum thulirthidume
Nagarkindra megangal pole
Thuyarangal nagarndhidume.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaaradi Nee'?

The song 'Yaaradi Nee' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Jarugandi'?

This song plays a significant role in portraying the romantic journey of the characters in Jarugandi.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Yaaradi Nee'?

The song is sung by Yuvan and composed by Bobo Shashi.

When was 'Yaaradi Nee' released?

'Yaaradi Nee' was released on September 26, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Yaaradi Nee', the protagonist reflects on love and the emotional turmoil that accompanies it. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it relatable to anyone who has loved deeply. It beautifully captures the essence of romance, portraying both joy and sorrow. This poignant track is a highlight in the film, resonating with the audience's emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaradi Nee from Jarugandi is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Yuvan's soulful voice and Uma Devi's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. The collaboration with music director Bobo Shashi adds a unique flair, making it a must-listen for Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Who are you? I will come in this time. The way I go, like a flower, I will be in the breeze. I thought of you, flower, and I saw you. In the midst of the world, I will remain hidden.
There is a bird with a voice, its wings spread wide. In the ocean, you are the moonlight.
New rains will fall, and the rains will also gather. In the bond of growth, the sugarcane will bloom.
Seeing the shining sun, the world will shine. Like clouds in the city, sorrows will disappear.
Oh..ho.. the star of the sky has come searching for the door. The words are fading away and will leave.
You will finish the troubles and will rest in the work. Like a messenger, I have come to hold you.
The eyes will remove the obstacles, and the breeze will carry us. Our times will join together, and we will change together.
When a path opens, does the forgotten path close? Does the forgotten path close? A path will open. It will open... Who are you? Who are you? Who are you?
New rains will fall, and the rains will also gather. In the bond of growth, the sugarcane will bloom.
Seeing the shining sun, the world will shine. Like clouds in the city, sorrows will disappear.
